cases.intakeSummary: Patient reports itching and discharge; onset 2 days ago; no prior treatment this episode.
cases.aiRecommendation: Based on condition "Yeast infection" and intake. Suggested treatment options: Antifungal cream or suppositories; Oral antifungal (if indicated). Physician to confirm.

redFlags.notes: No emergency criteria flagged in prototype.

cases.intakeSummary: Sudden onset headache, severity 8/10; nausea present; no neck stiffness reported.
cases.aiRecommendation: Based on reported symptoms (headache) and duration. Possible considerations: tension headache, migraine, viral illness. Suggested: physician to confirm diagnosis and treatment based on severity and red flags.

redFlags.notes: Monitor for neuro red flags; prototype only.

cases.intakeSummary: Sore throat 4 days; fever yes; pain 6/10.
